exclude_archived.description: When true, exclude responses that have been archived via the archive_response endpoint.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this survey.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return (1-500). Defaults to 100.

offset.description: Number of rows to skip for pagination. Combine with `limit` and the `has_more` field to paginate.

question_id.description: If set, only return rows where this question has a non-empty answer, and only include that question's answer in each row. Required when using score_lte or score_gte.

score_gte.description: Filter to rows where the rating answer for `question_id` is >= this value. Common use: NPS promoters with score_gte=9. Requires question_id.

score_lte.description: Filter to rows where the rating answer for `question_id` is <= this value. Common use: NPS detractors with score_lte=6. Requires question_id.

since.description: Only return responses submitted on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

until.description: Only return responses submitted on or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.
